requires.rationale: search must span 3+ heterogeneous entity kinds to justify type-grouping

structure.description: Global search bar in app-shell header with autocomplete dropdown that groups results by entity kind (Datasets / Dashboards / Terms / People). Each group shows top-N with kind icon; type-ahead is the canonical entry point, not navigation menu.

rationale.hypothesis: When the catalog spans heterogeneous entity kinds, a flat result list buries less-frequent kinds. Grouping by kind preserves discoverability of long-tail entities while keeping the dominant kind on top.

evidence.description: Top-bar search with 4 grouped sections in autocomplete: Datasets, Dashboards, Glossary Terms, People
Cmd-K palette groups by Issue / Project / Doc / Member
Top search with type filter chips (repo / code / issue / pr / user) — adjacent solution to same problem

counterexample.description: When there is one dominant entity kind, grouping adds noise — flat list is clearer

shouldMatch.reason: Conversations + Messages + People — 3 kinds warrant grouping

shouldNotMatch.reason: Single entity kind — Goal — flat list
